zh.lifeSummary: Adria De Waterville於1072年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾。她於1087年與Richard de Bois結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1113年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾索普 阿諾德享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Rare feminine form of   Adrian  , recorded in the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: Adria De Waterville was born in 1072, in Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard de Bois in 1087. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1113, in Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Adria De Waterville est née en 1072, à Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard de Bois en 1087. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1113, à Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, England,: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアソルペ アルノルド
ja.lifeSummary: Adria De Watervilleは1072年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルペ ワテルヴィルで生まれた。1087年にRichard de Boisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1113年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアソルペ アルノルドで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adria De Waterville(은)는 1072년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 소 왓르빌에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1087년 Richard de Bois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1113년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 소 아노드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Adria De Waterville родилась в 1072 г. в местности таурп вэитирвилл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Bois в 1087 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1113 г. в местности таурп арнолд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
